dialogos.texto_en: (After leaving Tinu Beach, we went around the island\n and visited the power spots recommended by Nino.)
(We also enjoyed Okinawan tourism,\n and delectable seafood for lunch...)
(We returned to the front of Ocean Tower again.)
As expected of Okinawa, the seafood was delicious.
It's just too good\nto be able to eat freshly caught seafood!
Teehee, it's only the first day of the trip and there will be\neven more delicious dishes to have!
Wowee!!
You too, Itsuki?
That's so her.
Umm, today we went to Heart Rock at Tinu Beach,\na cave at Chigunu Beach,\nand...Tokei Beach.
Yes, we went around and visited many places.\nWe must have seen all the famous spots.
Everywhere we went the ocean was clear and beautiful.
Yes, the view was wonderful, especially with the sunny weather.
I'm looking forward to seeing the photos later.
Anyway, that's about it for today's sightseeing, huh?\nConsidering the time to head back,\nit's probably about time to wrap up.
Ah! Wait!\nBefore we go back, can we go to Tinu Beach again?
Did you forget something?
No, it's not that.
If we go now, we can see Tinu Beach at dusk.\nI want to see it as the finishing touch for today.
Ah, I see. The sunset!\nWe should be able to see it from Tinu Beach.
Wow, I want to see it!\nIt's got to be beautiful!
Since we have plenty of time,\nlet's go as Nino suggested.
Okay.
I agree too!
Me too!
All right then,\nlet's go.
